{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"\n            CREATE INDEX index_ci_builds_on_commit_id_and_artifacts_expireatandidpartial\n            ON public.ci_builds\n            USING btree (commit_id, artifacts_expire_at, id)\n            WHERE (\n                ((type)::text = 'Ci::Build'::text)\n                AND ((retried = false) OR (retried IS NULL))\n                AND ((name)::text = ANY (ARRAY[\n                    ('sast'::character varying)::text,\n                    ('dependency_scanning'::character varying)::text,\n                    ('sast:container'::character varying)::text,\n                    ('container_scanning'::character varying)::text,\n                    ('dast'::character varying)::text\n                ]))\n            )\n            "}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION function_name (input_a character varying DEFAULT NULL::character varying)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"ROUND(CAST(x AS DOUBLE PRECISION))"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"SELECT JSON_ARRAY_ELEMENTS((foo->'sections')::JSON) AS sections"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"SELECT x FROM t WHERE CAST($1 AS TEXT) = 'ok'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"cast(a as FLOAT)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"gen: cast/type","sql":"cast(a as FLOAT4)"}
